ddls:
CREATE TABLE "game_results" (
  "game_id" TEXT /* ID of the game */,
  "human_id" TEXT /* ID of the human player */,
  "ai_id" TEXT /* ID of the AI opponent */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., rps, chess, Go) */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Game condition (e.g., Level2) */,
  "difficulty" INTEGER /* Game difficulty level */,
  "human_wins" INTEGER /* Number of human wins */,
  "ai_wins" INTEGER /* Number of AI wins */,
  "draws" INTEGER /* Number of draws */,
  "human_score" INTEGER /* Total human score */,
  "ai_score" INTEGER /* Total AI score */,
  "total_rounds" INTEGER /* Total number of rounds played */,
  "average_human_rt" REAL /* Average response time of the human player */,
  "average_ai_rt" REAL /* Average response time of the AI */,
  "game_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the game in seconds */,
  "game_comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes about the game results */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_games" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Foreign key to the users table */,
  "game_id" TEXT /* Foreign key to the games table */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_metrics" (
  "metric_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "game_id" TEXT /* Foreign key to the games table */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., human_accuracy, ai_accuracy) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of the metric (e.g., percentage, time, score) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)
column_names: Type of game (e.g., rps, chess, Go)
Average response time of the human player
Average response time of the AI
Duration of the game in seconds
Additional comments or notes about the game results
Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin)
Timestamp when the user account was created
